news.headline: Masco Corp CFO to present at Raymond James Conference on March 4, 2025, at 7:30 a.m. ET. Webcast available on www.masco.com.
news.summary: In Livonia, Michigan, Masco Corporation (NYSE: MAS) revealed that Rick Westenberg, Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, is scheduled to speak at the Raymond James 46th Annual Institutional Investors Conference in Orlando, Florida on March 4, 2025, at 7:30 a.m. Eastern Time. The presentation will be streamed live on the Company’s website in the Investor Relations segment at www.masco.com. A playback of the webcast will be accessible until May 27, 2025. Further details can be found in Masco Corporation’s press release.

news.headline: Multiple iconic brands like Therma-Tru, Larson, Fiberon, Fypon and Solar Innovations come together at 2025 International Builders’ Show in Booth #C3830, offering a combined 200+ years of expertise in durable products for professionals and homeowners.
news.summary: Visit Booth #C3830 at this year’s International Builders’ Show in MAUMEE, Ohio to witness an immersive experience brought to you by industry giants Therma-Tru, Larson, Fiberon, Fypon, and Solar Innovations. With over 200 years of collective experience and a focus on innovation, these companies are joining forces to offer building professionals and homeowners a comprehensive display of their top-quality products. This event will provide attendees with the opportunity to interact with a diverse range of durable and reliable products tailored for outdoor use.

news.headline: Fermion Protocol introduces fractional ownership of $1M Dolce & Gabbana suit, reshaping luxury ownership.
news.summary: In London, Fermion Protocol, a decentralized protocol known as a key player in the RWA tokenization space, has launched. They aim to enable fractional ownership and verified exchange of high-value real-world assets, particularly focusing on the luxury sector. The protocol has already made waves by fractionalizing the $1 million Dolce & Gabbana Glass Suit for community-driven ownership. This move is seen as groundbreaking in the industry, opening up significant opportunities for brands looking to engage in tokenization.

news.headline: Effective Fed Funds Rate 4.33% February 21 vs 4.33% February 20.
Owens Corning's Q4 earnings see 23% sales jump to $2.84B, EPS beat estimates, forecasts mid 20% revenue growth for Q1.
news.summary: Owens Corning Inc. (NYSE:OC) posted a strong performance in the fourth quarter of the year with a remarkable 23% increase in net sales reaching $2.84 billion, surpassing the anticipated $2.77 billion. Sales for the segments were distributed as follows: Composites at $515 million, showing minimal change year-over-year (Y/Y); Insulation at $926 million, a decrease of 1% Y/Y; and Roofing at $912 million, down by 2% Y/Y. Doors reported net sales of $564 million during the same quarter.Adjusted EBIT saw a rise to $430 million from $392 million, with a margin of 15% compared to 17% in the prior-year quarter. Additionally, Adjusted EBITDA experienced a 21% increase Y/Y to $629 million, while maintaining a flat margin of 22% Y/Y. Adjusted EPS also demonstrated growth, reaching $3.22 from $3.21 in the previous year, surpassing the expected $2.90.The company's operational cash flow slightly decreased to $676 million from $698 million, with free cash flow standing at $479 million, a 15% decrease Y/Y. In 2024, Owens Corning returned $638 million to shareholders through dividends and share buybacks, including the repurchase of 2.6 million shares.

news.headline: Lieutenant General (Ret.) Scott A. Spellmon joins SOSi as Senior Account Executive to boost growth in defense sector.
news.summary: SOSi, a company based in Reston, Virginia, has recently appointed Lieutenant General (Ret.) Scott A. Spellmon as Senior Account Executive to drive growth in the defense and national security industries. In this new position, Spellmon will focus on developing business prospects, influencing market strategies, and enhancing capture plans for these sectors. His duties will involve bolstering client and industry partnerships to facilitate company success.

news.headline: NYSE offers pre-market update on Feb 24, 2025, providing market insights before trading begins with Trinity Chavez.
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, in New York, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) is introducing a daily pre-market update live from the NYSE Trading Floor. This update provides valuable market insights before the start of trading each day. Trinity Chavez presents this pre-market update, ensuring viewers are informed before engaging in trading activities.

news.headline: $11.5B tokenized RWAs on-chain, value could hit $16T by 2030. XDC launches first funds in token form with Archax.
news.summary: Tokenized RWAs worth $11.5 billion are currently on-chain, with projections suggesting a potential increase to $16 trillion by 2030. As institutional-grade decentralized finance grows in popularity, traditional investment vehicles are transitioning to the blockchain to benefit from enhanced liquidity, quicker settlements, and lower operational expenses. XDC has launched the initial tokenized funds in partnership with Archax, a regulated digital asset exchange, broker, and custodian. This marks a significant development in the industry.

news.headline: Hacker converts $3.64M to DAI on DEXs, linked to Bybit breach. ETH-Dai transfers made, some to eXch amid frozen funds dispute.
news.summary: Following the Bybit exploit, addresses associated with the incident conducted swaps of millions worth of Ethereum (ETH) for DAI on decentralized exchanges (DEXs). A portion of these swapped funds were transferred to eXch, the cryptocurrency exchange under scrutiny for its decision not to freeze the stolen funds.

news.headline: Today, the crypto market faces a dip due to outflows from product funds and the recent Bybit hack, leading to a bearish trend.
news.summary: Today, the cryptocurrency market is experiencing a decline in value, with investors expressing concerns over the outflows in cryptocurrency product funds and a recent hack on Bybit. These events are seen as contributing factors leading the market towards a bearish trend. This situation has resulted in a decrease in overall market value, impacting various cryptocurrencies and their respective prices.

news.summary: Celebrate 40 years of groundbreaking innovation at Central Hall, where NanaWall will showcase its cutting-edge glass wall systems at Booth #C3008 in CORTE MADERA, California. Scheduled for February 24, 2025, the International Builders' Show 2025 (IBS) will be the stage for NanaWall's industry-disrupting presentation.

news.headline: SEC concludes investigation into Robinhood with no action taken; platform criticizes "unnecessary" probe.
news.summary: In a recent statement, the trading platform expressed that the regulator's investigation should not have been initiated.

news.summary: A recent report on the Industrial AI Market is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. Industrial artificial intelligence (AI) is significantly changing the manufacturing and process industries by revolutionizing automation, process optimization, and decision-making. The report highlights three key application areas: Product Innovation, which utilizes AI to enhance products and develop new business opportunities. This technology is experiencing substantial growth, with the market offering promising prospects for development.

news.headline: U.S. Secretary of Energy Chris Wright to speak at 10th Powering Africa Summit on March 6-7 at JW Marriott Washington, D.C.

news.summary: In Wilmington, Delaware on February 24, 2025, the Will Marlow Agency (WMA), a top digital marketing firm known for data-focused advertising and analysis, revealed the selection of Paul Gallagher as the new Chief Operating Officer (COO) and Reva Henderson as the General Manager.

news.headline: Company purchases 20,356 BTC for nearly $2B; nearing 500K BTC holdings in line with "21/21 Plan."
news.summary: Michael Saylor's company, Strategy, purchased 20,356 bitcoins for $1.99 billion at an average price of $97,514 per bitcoin. This acquisition was made after a $2 billion note offering as part of the "21/21 Plan."

news.headline: AI in Computer Vision market expected to reach $117 billion by 2030 due to advancements in deep learning, triggering rise in smart surveillance and autonomous vehicles.
news.summary: Dublin-based ResearchAndMarkets.com has released a comprehensive report titled "AI in Computer Vision Market 2025 - 2030," which offers insights into the industry's technology, solutions, use cases, deployment models, and verticals. The report provides valuable information on market size, forecasts, trends, and leading players operating in this sector. Covering a wide range of aspects related to the AI Computer Vision market, the report presents detailed forecasts, key components, and technological advancements shaping the industry's landscape.

news.headline: Grok 3 predicts Bitcoin to hit $180,000 by 2025, citing growing institutional adoption & potential U.S. strategic reserve status. BTC to dominate a $3.23 trillion market.
news.summary: An AI called Grok 3, developed by xAI, predicts that Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) will reach $180,000 by the end of 2025. This forecast is driven by increasing institutional adoption and the possibility of Bitcoin becoming part of the U.S. strategic reserves. Grok 3's analysis, requested by Strategy executive chairman Michael Saylor, positions Bitcoin as the leading cryptocurrency in a market valued at $3.23 trillion. The factors supporting Bitcoin's dominance include its scarcity, institutional support, and potential inclusion in the U.S. strategic reserves. The AI highlights Bitcoin's status as "digital gold" and its limited supply of 21 million coins as reasons for its superiority among crypto assets in 2025.

This independent third-party assessment was released following Bybit's completion of...

news.headline: OpenAI reaches 400M weekly users. Analysis questions Google stock's investment potential.
news.summary: Google's internet search advertising division continues to be pivotal, with OpenAI reporting a notable milestone of 400 million weekly active users. This development raises the question of whether Google stock is a wise investment decision.

news.headline: Nike stock rises after upgrade and price target hike by Jefferies. Analyst predicts improved margins and market share.

Jefferies, a leading analyst, predicts that the company's margins and market share will experience positive growth. The news has generated notable interest among investors and stakeholders in the market.

news.headline: Musk's DOGE actions impact Tesla brand, but self-driving tech remains priority. Stock affected but brand issues containable.
news.summary: Renowned Tesla advocate Dan Ives believes that Elon Musk's involvement with DOGE has potentially impacted Tesla's stock performance negatively. Despite these challenges, Ives maintains that these are manageable branding difficulties. The primary focus remains on achieving the ultimate goal of autonomous driving technology. This situation highlights the significance of staying true to Tesla's core objectives amidst external distractions. The latest developments underscore the delicate balance between individual actions and the broader impact on the company's reputation and financial standing.

news.headline: Hivelocity is fully integrated after being acquired by Colohouse, strengthening its position as a leading infrastructure provider. (Characters: 106)

news.headline: Basketball legend Dennis Rodman introduces Rodman Playoffs 50,000 Puffs Disposable Vape with customizable features and five flavors.

news.summary: A leading plumbing manufacturer, TOTO, displayed cutting-edge product design, smart technology, and sustainable solutions for improved comfort, wellness, and eco-friendly living. The company presented these innovations in MORROW, Georgia on February 24, 2025. TOTO, with annual sales exceeding $5.34 billion, is known for its commitment to pioneering solutions that prioritize both consumer well-being and environmental sustainability.

news.headline: Chung-Ang Univ in S Korea finds impact of PRRSV on swine immunity using single-cell RNA analysis.
news.summary: Researchers in South Korea have utilized single-cell RNA analysis to uncover essential immune mechanisms in the lungs of pigs infected with porcine reproductive and respiratory syndrome virus (PRRSV). The study conducted in Seoul revealed critical insights into the immune responses triggered by this virus. The findings, presented on February 24, 2025, shed light on the specific mechanisms at play during the infection, offering valuable information for further research in this area.
